unit.scope: Full server vitest suite. Targeted regression: tree-route.test.ts adds 'directory-form negation honours re-includes' (12 tests in file, all passing). Adjacent file-route + routes tests re-run (64 tests total) post-rename-fix — clean.

e2e.scope: Phase Matrix: BUG/small/no UI-touch (server-only) → E2E not required.

surface_verification.justification: Advisory at small complexity + touches_public_api (no io_boundary, no UI code touched). The unit test mounts the actual Hono route via app.request() and exercises the full handler lifecycle — identical to a port-bound server, only the TCP socket is missing. Diff is 12 lines of behavior change in one map() callback.
